chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1843 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7299/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7300/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.7301/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 03.11.2025 Mr. Ghulam Rasool Chandio, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, states that he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
